features: Energy Saving: Low power consumption, super bright. Our 5W G9 LED bulb can replace a 40W incandescent bulb and provide the same level of brightness, not only saving 90% on your electricity bill but also protecting the environment.

Cool White Light: 560 lumens of 6000K cool white light with a 360 degree beam angle provides instant-on, even and flicker-free light with no buzzing sound, creating a warm and cosy ambience. High colour rendering (CRI > 80) provides vivid and true colour.

Long Service Life: Using high quality chips, the G9 LED bulbs can last 30,000 hours, reducing the frequency of troublesome relights. There is no harmful radiation. Excellent cool white light to illuminate your home.
G9 Bulbs Size: The size of G9 bulbs is 15.6mm x 50.6mm, a little larger than a traditional halogen bulb. With standard G9 base, it fits all G9 base light easily. Suitable for AC 220-245V.

Widely Application: Suitable for interior lighting, such as chandelier, crystal light, ceiling fan light, desk lamps, living room, dining room, office and restaurant. Please do not use it with dimmers as this will cause the bulb to flicker or make noise.
description: Product Description Specifications: Wattage： 5W LED Bulb Quantity: 6 Packs Color temperature: 6000K (Cool white) LED life: >30000H Luminous flux: 560lm CRI: 80 Beam Angle: 360° Size: 15.6mm x 50.6mm
